allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\('public/vela-192.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('192:', m.width, 'x', m.height, m.format\)\); sharp\('public/vela-512.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('512:', m.width, 'x', m.height, m.format\)\); sharp\('src/assets/vela.jpg'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('source:', m.width, 'x', m.height, m.format\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\('public/vela-192.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('192:', m\)\); sharp\('public/vela-512.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('512:', m\)\); sharp\('public/apple-touch-icon.png'\).metadata\(\).then\(m => console.log\('apple:', m\)\);")
